title: Grilled Steak Fajitas
description: A classic Mexican dish featuring grilled steak and sautéed vegetables, served with warm flour tortillas.

ingredients.name: grilled steak
ingredients.notes: 1 inch thick, cut into thin strips

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the minced onion and bell pepper and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the fajita seasoning and cook for 1 minute.
Add the grilled steak to the skillet and cook until browned and cooked to desired doneness.
Warm the flour tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the fajitas by placing the steak and vegetables onto the tortillas and serving with cooked white rice.
